description: A reader at revision depth 1 catches up to a seed at depth 3 in a single HEADS/WANT pass, verifying that only the delta is fetched.

assertions.description: Reader successfully received the missing delta revision via HEADS-based incremental sync.
Reader verified and stored the new delta revision objects after catchup.
Reader object set matches seed object set after catchup.
Reader replay results match seed replay results after catchup.
Reader accepted heads match seed accepted heads after catchup.

notes: Proves M4 production replication sub-item 2: depth-N incremental catchup.
Seed holds genesis + 2 follow-up revisions (depth 3). Reader is pre-seeded with genesis + 1 follow-up revision (depth 2).
A single HEADS/WANT pass delivers only the one missing revision, leaving reader fully caught up.
